summary.lv: Intrum Global Technologies Rīgā meklē Senior QA Engineer ar API un integrāciju fokusu, kas izveido un attīsta automatizēto testēšanu, uztur stabilus testa ietvarus un integrē tos CI/CD plūsmā.
summary.en: Intrum Global Technologies in Riga is hiring a Senior QA Engineer focused on API and integration testing — establishing automated tests, maintaining scalable test frameworks, and integrating them into the CI/CD pipeline.
